## Summary

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run verify`
- [ ] Additional manual checks described below when needed

## Documentation

- [ ] Docs updated in the same change, or not needed
- [ ] API docs updated if routes or payloads changed
- [ ] Deployment docs updated if the self-hosting contract changed

## Risk

- [ ] Scheduler, MQTT command, or database behavior changed
- [ ] Rollback or mitigation notes added below if risk is non-trivial

## Rollout / Rollback Notes
